message:
fix(engine): epoch monotonicity guards and numeric safety in gate/saga/cache subsystems

Epoch advancement:
- benchmark_freshness_gate: reject regressive epoch in advance_epoch()
  to prevent stale alarm pruning and epoch confusion; fix alarm ledger
  record_alarm() to correctly subtract previous severity when replacing
  an existing alarm (was double-counting); tests for both
- saga_orchestrator: same regressive epoch guard — prevents active sagas
  from being incorrectly invalidated by a stale epoch; test for
  regression protection

Cache policy monotonicity:
- module_cache: invalidate_policy_change() now uses max() to ensure
  policy versions never regress — a stale policy version notification
  no longer purges entries belonging to a newer policy; test

Numeric safety:
- gc_pause: saturating_add/saturating_mul in pause histogram bucket
  calculation to prevent overflow on extreme GC pause distributions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
